作品 文字 实验室 关于 联系
AI 编程实践者 · 教普通人用 AI 做产品 AI Coder · Building with AI

用 AI 把想法
变成能用的产品。 Turn ideas into
shippable products
with AI.

我是 木尘，用 AI 编程，也帮别人学会用 AI。 I'm Mu Chen. I build with AI and help others do the same.

不会写代码没关系。AI 已经让「做产品」这件事前所未有地简单。我在这里记录实践，也希望能帮你迈出第一步。 You don't need to know how to code. AI has made building products easier than ever. I share what I learn, and I'd love to help you get started.

看看做了什么 See my work → 找我聊聊 Let's talk
muchen@ai-workstation — zsh
➜ ~ whoami
muchen
➜ ~ cat mission.txt
帮助更多人用 AI 做出人生第一个产品。 Help more people build their first product with AI.
➜ ~ ai build --idea "a landing page"
✓ 生成完毕，耗时 47 秒 ✓ Built in 47 seconds
➜ ~
47+

01 — WORKS

用 AI 做过的东西 Built with AI

// AI-powered products
🤖
AI工具 · 已上线 AI Tool · Live

AI 课程助手 AI Study Buddy

用 AI 帮学生自动整理课程笔记、生成复习卡片，还能根据薄弱点出题。一个学生说期末复习效率翻了三倍。 AI-powered note-taking and flashcard generator. One student said it tripled their study efficiency.

Next.js · OpenAI 查看 View →
📋
AI效率 · 已上线 Productivity · Live

一键剪贴板 Clipboard AI

复制任何内容，AI 自动帮你生成摘要、提取待办、分类归档。一个指令，省去你 80% 的整理时间。 Copy anything — AI summarizes, extracts todos, and sorts it. One command, 80% less organizing.

Web · Claude 查看 View →
🎯
AI产品 · 实验 AI Product · Beta

AI 模拟面试官 AI Interview Coach

输入目标岗位，AI 扮演面试官进行多轮模拟面试，最后给出个性化反馈和改进建议。帮朋友练了 3 次就拿到 offer。 AI-powered mock interviews with personalized feedback. A friend got an offer after 3 sessions.

React · Vercel 查看 View →
📝
AI内容 · 开源 AI Content · OSS

小红书文案机 Copywriter AI

输入产品名和卖点，AI 一次生成 10 条小红书风格的爆款文案。一个小商家用它日更账号，粉丝涨了 3000+。 Generate 10 viral social posts at once. A small business gained 3000+ followers using it daily.

Python · Streamlit 查看 View →
02 — WRITING

关于 AI 的记录 Notes on AI

// 帮更多人学会用 AI // helping others learn AI
2026.07.14

不会写代码的人，如何用 Cursor 做出人生第一个产品How to build your first product with Cursor

从零到一，没有编程基础也能动手做东西的完整指南。A complete guide for total beginners to build something real.

AI 编程AI Coding 2026.06.02

我用 AI 做了一款产品，全程没写一行代码I shipped a product without writing a single line of code

只靠对话和提示词，两周上线第一个 AI 工具。Shipped in 2 weeks with just prompts and conversations.

实战Case Study 2026.04.18

Prompt 工程没有你想的那么复杂Prompt engineering is simpler than you think

不需要背模板，掌握这 3 个原则就够了。No templates to memorize — just 3 principles.

AI 技巧Tips 2026.02.09

写给想用 AI 做东西但不知道从何开始的人For those who want to build with AI but don't know where to start

如果你有一个想法但觉得技术门槛太高，这篇文章是写给你的。If you have an idea but feel blocked by tech, this is for you.

入门Getting Started 2025.10.30

AgentAgent 2025.08.15

04 — ABOUT

关于我 About

想用 AI 做点什么？我可以帮你。 Want to build with AI? I can help.

不管你是想做一个小工具、一个网站，还是一个产品，AI 已经让这件事变得前所未有地简单。如果你不知道从哪里开始，欢迎找我聊聊。 Whether it's a small tool, a website, or a full product — AI has made building easier than ever. Not sure where to start? Let's talk.

✉️ haozq2012@gmail.com 🐙 GitHub 🐦 X 👽 Reddit
